feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Go Along Aching
entry.summary:
Author: atlasmorgan

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,342Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 33

Summary: Magic has been legalized. Camelot and the court are getting used to it. But still, Arthur knows better than anyone how quickly a kingdom can change from one reign to another, and he wants to make sure that the protections he has in place for magic users are harder to unbind than just the slash of a quill through rewritten laws. So he goes to the Druids. Proposes a formal treaty. He doesn't expect it to come in the form of a marriage proposal, and he really doesn't expect it to be Emrys they want him to marry. -or- The one where Arthur tries to make a treaty and ends up marrying Emrys instead. He's got no idea that Merlin is Emrys.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Gwaine (Merlin)
  • Gwen (Merlin)
  • Druids (Merlin)
  • Fake Marriage
  • Not Canon Compliant
  • miscommunication as a plot device
  • but its good i promise
  • Not Actually Unrequited Love

entry.title: The Shape of Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Joy_peace

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,956Chapters: 5/8Kudos: 37

Summary: Arthur has always trusted Merlin—just not for the reasons Merlin thinks. When Camelot’s peace fractures and something ancient begins to stir, secrets long held in silence begin to surface…and not all of them belong to Merlin.

entry.title: Rum and Coca-Cola
entry.summary:
Author: naufragio_lunar

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,257Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 54

Summary: Merlin does not like Arthur Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon does not like Merlin. Unfortunately, Uther Pendragon would like his son to do well in his Physics GCSE and Merlin is in need of cash. How did we get to Year 11 Prom?

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,979Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 82

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: just close your eyes, you'll be alright
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 543Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: Arthur leaned against the fig tree opposite Gwen. He had not realized how tightly he had been wound until now. Until Gwen laughed again. Safe. All of them safe.

entry.title: Essetir’s Kings Manservant
entry.summary:
Author: RamonaflowersFrFr

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,105Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Before Hunith had decided to send Merlin to Camelot he went to try and convince King Cenred to help protect his village, one thing after another Cenred decided he liked the boy and he would be appointed his manservant — Camelot and Essetir are having feast in Camelots attempt at a peace treaty, Arthur finds himself allured by the Manservant and keeps going back to him throughout the feast, Merlin is equally as intrigued in Arthur, he can feel his magic pulling him towards Arthur every moment they’re together.

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,839Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 27

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Creative Outlets
entry.summary:
Author: unrealitycheck

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,672Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: ''I don't understand,'' said Merlin, tossing one of the stories aside. He found it impossible to meet the dragon's eyes. ''Why did you write this?'' The dragon was infuriatingly calm. ''It is exactly as I've told you, Merlin. Arthur is your destiny. He is your other half, the one that makes you whole.'' ''Yes, I know. But did you really have to write this rubbish about us kissing and all that?'' Or: Merlin discovers Kilgharrah’s stash of fanfiction. It turns out to be very illuminating.

entry.title: Freeze, Freeze thou Bitter Wind
entry.summary:
Author: Cookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,375Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 56

Summary: After the events of Gaius's abduction, Merlin's anger towards Arthur and Agravaine grows. Unsure of his place in Arthur's life and the weight of his own growing grief and shame, Merlin decides his only action is to leave Camelot.

entry.title: Among the Heavy Ashes
entry.summary:
Author: Mischel

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 329Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Morgana wants to strike Camelot where it hurts the most. Everyone knows that. Yet sometimes, her actions are as unpredictable as the wind. Kneeling in the ashes of a whole village that Morgana had burned down, Merlin learns just that.Written for @merthurmicrofic on tumblr. prompt: frog

entry.title: Just a Little Fun
entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,537Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 66

Summary: Merlin arrives in Camelot and meets an arrogant, infuriatingly attractive knight. Who he thinks is just some Noble's son who wants to get dicked down by a peasant. While Merlin is happy to play along - nothing in Camelot is ever what it seems—and his simple fun is about to get so much more complicated.

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,015Chapters: 12/55Kudos: 77

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon’s protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon’s curse begins to stir — and Uther Pendragon’s madness stands as a warning — Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: The Touch Of Love
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,234Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 57

Summary: Merlin's eyes changed when he did magic. He knew that. In the privacy of his own head, Arthur had come to think of that golden gleam as beautiful since he'd discovered the secret of his sorcery. This was different. It crackled like lightning; a storm held in Merlin's gaze. It cast brief light upon his cheekbones, spilling odd shadows across his face.'What's happening?''He is dying,' a woman's voice said, sugar-sweet. 'And he will take you with him, Arthur Pendragon.'---A routine hunt threatens to become a fatal disaster when Arthur and Merlin are captured and imprisoned in a dungeon used during the Purge. Can they fight their way to freedom, or will Merlin's power be the death of them?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 72,052Chapters: 14/20Kudos: 54

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Dragon's Fulfilment
entry.summary:
Author: Amacerise

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,533Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Arthur, his Knights, and Merlin return from their quest to kill a hippogriff. But not without new secrets to whisper, new treasures to cherish, and a whole court to beguile into believing that Arthur and his manservant aren't married in everything but name. It's one year until Merlin gives birth to his clutch of dragonlings. What tribulations will follow in the meantime? Rating may go up, tags may change. This is primarily an exercise in discovery writing so bear with me for major pauses; hopefully it's not a mess.

entry.title: Say the word
entry.summary:
Author: a_bored_fan

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,217Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 352

Summary: Arthur is the only son to Uther Pendragon, magic-hating King of Camelot.Merlin is the most powerful wizard in existence.Their friendship is not only unlikely but potentially dangerous (for Merlin). Add into the mix a centuries-old curse that affects every person throughout the kingdom, and really, everything could go completely wrong.   Or: If you fall in love with someone their name appears on your forearm. Merlin and Arthur, despite having many differences and sometimes arguments, get along, maybe too much for their own good.   I am back, and editing and revisiting the first chapters. You can reread the edited versions or wait till I post the newer ones, love yall.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: New Beginnings
entry.summary:
Author: Moontra992

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,497Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 29

Summary: The final battle is won. Merlin has fulfilled his destiny. He is dropped from the sky into a new time and place and seeks to fit in and to figure out his new destiny - if there is any.

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,970,633Chapters: 127/?Kudos: 1,633

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
